title: conda not on PATH in a detached shell -> embedding step fails
class_reason: Environment/infra defect. Detached (non-login) shells do not source conda init, so `conda activate` is unavailable. Resolution: absolute interpreter path /opt/envs/spatialpatho/bin/python. Nothing in the 7-point checklist covers env wiring.
belongs_to: pipeline smoke test (not Inspect Critic eval)
proposed_guard: Smoke test: assert `/opt/envs/spatialpatho/bin/python -c 'import torch, openslide'` returns 0 from a detached shell; forbid bare `conda activate` in batch scripts.
